channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: The Cat in the Hat: Rainy Day Mayhem announced for PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

Party game due out on October 30.

Publisher Outright Games and developer Casual Brothers, in cooperation with Dr. Seuss Enterprises, have announced The Cat in the Hat: Rainy Day Mayhem, a new party game inspired by The Cat in the Hat children’s book. It will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on October 30.

Here is an overview of the game, via Outright Games:

About

The Cat in the Hat once said, “It is fun to have fun, but you have to know how.”

Everyone from the mischievous Dr. Seuss classic is here. Become smart and steady Sally, energetic wild card Johnny, cause double the trouble as Thing 1 and Thing 2 or be cheerful Little Cat A. And of course, the chaos conductor, The Cat in the Hat and anxiously wise Fish will be there to help, on this zany ride.

Play solo or go against your friends, choosing from two trick-filled game modes. Fancy a game of chase? Then “Find the Cat” will have you turning the house upside down looking for The Cat in the Hat. Or maybe you prefer getting into chaotic challenges? See how quickly you can capture penguins, decorate a cake, and who knows what else in the 18 minigames you can choose from.

But the fun doesn’t stop there, just like The Cat’s hat, it’ll be full of tricks. With varying difficulty levels, long challenges and short, there’s something for everyone.

Get ready for your house to be filled with giggles, groans, and glorious mayhem.

Key Features

  • Elevate Your Game Night – Dive into the mayhem solo or race to the end with up to four players.
  • Classic Dr. Seuss Characters – Play as Sally, Johnny, Thing 1 and Thing 2 and Little Cat.
  • Choose Your Mode for Non-Stop Fun – Pick from 18 entertaining minigames or find The Cat across 14 rooms.
  • Bounce, Chase, and Paint to Win – Compete for rewards. Will you find all the stickers for your book?
  • A Party for All Ages – Re-play in different ways, with easy controls and varying difficulties.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/the-cat-in-the-hat-rainy-day-mayhem-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-ps4-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Rumor: Rayman Legends Retold to be announced by June 2
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Reportedly due out on October 1.

A remake of Rayman Legends, titled Rayman Legends Retold, will be unveiled and available for pre-order no later than June 2 at around 1:00 a.m. PT / 4:00 a.m. ET, according to reliable leaker Billbil-kun.

Rayman Legends Retold is reportedly developed by Ubisoft Montpellier and features an online multiplayer cooperative mode for up to four players. It is said it will launch on October 1, with physical editions available for PlayStation 5 and Switch 2 for $39.99.

Billbil-kun’s report corroborates a recent report from Insider Gaming, which said the game will launch on October 1. N1-UP recently said that Rayman has been slightly redesigned—now with two separate eyes, more detail on his shoes, and sweater drawstrings tied into a knot—and will receive various new skins, including looks from classic Rayman games, and crossovers like ASTRO BOT and Clair Obscur: Expedition 33. Notable leaker NatetheHate said Rayman Legends Retold will be announced during the State of Play broadcast on June 2—though the ‘no later than’ pre-order time provided by Billbil-kun contradicts this information.

Before all of these reports, the Twitter account @intercelluar posted a logo for the game, and just yesterday posted another one for a “Rayman Origins Enhanced Edition.”



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/rumor-rayman-legends-retold-to-be-announced-by-june-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road fifth free major update ‘New Kick-Off DLC’ launches June 11
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Introducing Synergies and the Victory Road Route.

LEVEL-5 will release Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road‘s fifth free major update, “New Kick‑Off DLC,” on June 11, the company announced.

Here are the details:

Fifth Free Major Update “New Kick-Off DLC” Revealed

The fifth free major update, “New Kick‑Off DLC,” is now announced!

This update will introduce Seasonal Players for the official online tournament Victory Road, implement a new feature, Synergies, and add the new Victory Road Route to Chronicle Mode, which follows the story of Destin Billows (Unmei Sasanami).

This update is scheduled for release on Thursday, June 11 (JST). Stay tuned for more details!

A New Feature: Synergies

We are introducing Synergies, a new feature that grants team-wide buffs when specific conditions are met.

You’ll be able to find Synergies in the in-game shop. Offensive ones grant offensive buffs, while Defensive ones provide defence-oriented buffs.

Activation is based on combinations of characters who, in past Inazuma Eleven titles, share deep connections. This lets you build effective teams while celebrating your favorite characters.

New Trailer Released to Help Build Your Team

A new trailer showcasing Synergies and the Build Ranks system—features that further boost team performance—is now available.

In this Football Crash-Course, Destin Billows (Unmei Sasanami) guides Harper Evans (Haru Endo) through the fundamentals of team building, offering key insights to help you create your own squads.

The trailer is ideal for beginners to competitive play, as well as for players just jumping into Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road.

Details Revealed for the Victory Road Tournament

We have released new information on the Victory Road Tournament.

The official website now lists Seasonal Players’ information, required for participation, as well as the tournament format and some of the potential rewards.

A fresh, information-packed trailer, narrated by Chester Horse Jr (Keita Kakuma), offers a clear overview of the progression and detailed rules.

Inazuma Eleven: Victory Road is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

Free Major Update “New Kick-Off DLC” Trailer

Football Crash-Course by Destin Billows

Victory Road Tournament Brief



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/inazuma-eleven-victory-road-fifth-free-major-update-new-kick-off-dlc-launches-june-11
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Wuthering Waves version 3.4 update ‘The Dream Not Dreamed’ launches June 8
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Smartphone

The Cyberpunk collaboration update.

Kuro Games will release the version 3.4 update for free-to-play open-world action RPG Wuthering Waves, dubbed “The Dream Not Dreamed,” on June 8, the developer announced.

Here is an overview of the update, via Kuro Games:

  • Events
    • Night City Roaming
      • This is a place where dreams overlap with reality, where violence and conflict keep fortunes flowing. Here, everything is up for grabs, provided you can pay the price. Welcome to Night City.
      • Participate in various events such as Episodic Quest, Collab Resonators Trial, Nightmare Challenge, In Night City Roaming. For more details about the event rules, stay tuned for official announcements.
    • Instant Flashlight
      • During the Version 3.4 collaboration event, Rovers with a Union Level above 10 may claim 5-Star Resonator Rebecca for free.
    • Gifts of Dreamchasers
      • During the event, log in to claim the day’s login rewards for 10 days in total.
    • Sweetdream Tuning
      • During the Version 3.4 event, participate in the Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaboration Resonator Convene and Collab Weapon Convene to accumulate Convene counts for Sweetdream Tuning and unlock bonus rewards.
  • Optimizations
    • Weekly Activity Tab – A Weekly Activity tab has been added. Doing any Weekly Activity Task allows you to claim Weekly Activity Points. Upon reaching specific Activity Point milestones, you may claim the corresponding Weekly Rewards. Your accumulated Weekly Activity Points, as well as the Weekly Rewards for each milestone, are reset every Monday.
      “Phantasma Dreamland: Rhapsody” has also been added.
    • Optimized Resonator Ascension Planner – Set clear ascension goals either in the Resonator Ascension Planner or in the Guidebook’s material acquisition view. Once you set a goal, you can immediately see all required materials in the Guidebook and jump straight to the locations where you can obtain them. You can also access the Guide Depot via a shortcut button on the Resonator Ascension Planner page.
    • One-Click Skill Upgrade – With enough materials, use the slider on the skill upgrade page to choose your target level and complete a one-click upgrade all the way to max.
    • Motorbike Appearance Presets – You can now use the Import Preset feature to create and save multiple looks as presets, then apply or switch between them anytime.
  • New Quests
    • Chapter III Side Story “At Dream’s Edge”
      • *Early access to the quest is available via “Next Stop: ‘Night City'” Event after reaching the transport dock during the Main Quest “What Burns Beneath Frostlands.” The quest is automatically accepted after the completion of the Main Quest “Beneath a Melting Night Sky.”
    • Chapter III – Segue “We Choose the Sky”
  • New Enemies
    • Nightmare: Adam Smasher
    • Nightmare: Armed Corpo
    • Nightmare: Security Corpo
    • Nightmare: Spec Ops Corpo
  • New Sonata Effects
    • Shadow of Shattered Dreams
  • New Tactical Hologram Challenge
    • Tactical Hologram: Nameless Explorer
  • New Area
    • Somnoire: Night City
  • New Resonators
    • Lucy (5-Star)
    • Rebecca (5-Star)
  • Upcoming Collaboration Resonator Convene – Duration Version 3.4 update – July 9, 2026 11:59 (server time)
    • Dreaming Upon the Moon
    • Rekindled Embers of Rage
  • New Weapons
    • Spectral Trigger
    • Skull Thrasher
  • Upcoming Collaboration Weapon Convene – Duration Version 3.4 update – July 9, 2026 11:59 (server time)
    • Spectral Trigger
    • Skull Thrasher
  • Special Events
    • Collaboration Featured Event: Night City Roaming
    • Collaboration Puzzle Event: Matrix Reform
    • Collaboration Special Login Event: Instant Flashlight
    • 10-Day Special Login Event: Gifts of Dreamchasers
    • Sweetdream Tuning
  • New Resonator
    • Lucilla (5-Star)
  • Upcoming Featured Resonator Convene
    • Tomorrow in the Frame – June 13, 2026 to July 9, 2026 at 11:59 (server time)
    • Dance in the Storm’s Wake – June 18, 2026 at 10:00 to July 9, 2026 at 11:59 (server time)
  • New Weapon
    • Freeze Frame
  • Upcoming Featured Weapon Convene
    • Freeze Frame – June 13, 2026 at 10:00 to July 9, 2026 at 11:59 (server time)
    • Defier’s Thorn – Jun 18, 2026 at 10:00 to July 9, 2026 at 11:59 (server time)
  • Special Events
    • Featured Combat Event: Depths of Illusive Realm: Dreamchasers
    • Leisure Event: Startorch Racing, Rerun!
    • Limited-Time Login Event: Dream of Azure Sky
  • Outfit Accessories
    • Lynae – Unbound Brilliance ($3.99) – One purchase only, permanently available for 400 Astrites after Version 3.4.
    • Mornye – Corner of the Star Sea ($3.99) – One purchase only, permanently available for 400 Astrites after Version 3.4.
  • Event
    • Confirmed for Anime Expo 2026 from July 2 to 5, 2026 in Los Angeles, California
  • Merchandise
    • Wuthering Waves x HASK

Wuthering Waves is available now for PlayStation 5, PC via client download, Steam, and Epic Games Store, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play, and is coming to Xbox Series and PC via Microsoft Store in July.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

Version 3.4 Trailer: The Dream Not Dreamed

Japanese

Korean

Cyberpunk: Edgerunners Collaboration Area Showcase

Korean

Version 3.4 Special Broadcast

Korean
